# Bad Decisions Studio

> Creative technology Studio focused on AI, real-time 3D (Unreal Engine), and content. Run by Farhad Shababi and Faraz Shababi and a team from Vancouver and Dubai.

Bad Decisions Studio is built around three pillars: Content (a podcast, long-form educational videos, and short-form videos), Education (premium programs and free tutorials), and Services (consulting, AI-enabled solutions, training, interactive experiences, content strategy).

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.baddecisions.studio/): Brand overview and the three paths
- [Podcast](https://www.baddecisions.studio/podcast): The Bad Decisions Podcast — a practical guide to modern tech, AI, and business. New episodes Tuesday and Friday.
- [Education](https://www.baddecisions.studio/education): Premium programs (AI, Unreal Engine) and free YouTube series
- [Work With Us](https://www.baddecisions.studio/work-with-us): Services, media partnerships, and open roles
- [Services](https://www.baddecisions.studio/work-with-us/services): Consulting, AI-enabled solutions, corporate training, interactive experiences, content strategy
- [Media Partnerships](https://www.baddecisions.studio/work-with-us/media-partnerships): Brand sponsorships across podcast, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and newsletter
- [Open Roles](https://www.baddecisions.studio/work-with-us/open-roles): Currently hiring — Video Editor and Social Media Manager

## Programs

- [Ultimate Unreal Engine Program](https://learn.baddecisions.studio): Step-by-step program teaching Unreal Engine 5 — virtual production, MetaHuman characters, 4K environments, advanced lighting. 55 modules, 20+ hours.
- [Ultimate AI for Creatives Program](https://ai.baddecisions.studio): Hands-on AI workflows, curated tool picks, and step-by-step playbooks for creators
- [Student Academy](https://academy.baddecisions.studio): LMS for enrolled students (login)

## Listen

- [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/show/12jUe4lIJgxE4yst7rrfmW): The Bad Decisions Podcast on Spotify
- [Apple Podcasts](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/bad-decisions-podcast/id1677462934): The Bad Decisions Podcast on Apple
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@badxstudio): Full episodes and free tutorials

## Reach

- 15M+ YouTube views, 271K+ subscribers
- 300K+ Instagram followers
- 47K+ TikTok followers
- 10M+ monthly cross-platform reach
- 100+ podcast episodes
- 1,500+ students enrolled across 80+ countries

## Connected sites

- [learn.baddecisions.studio](https://learn.baddecisions.studio): Unreal Engine program landing page (`llms.txt` available)
- [ai.baddecisions.studio](https://ai.baddecisions.studio): AI for Creatives program landing page (`llms.txt` available)
- [academy.baddecisions.studio](https://academy.baddecisions.studio): Student LMS (login required)
